privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. Patient names are Leo Das (child) and Priya Das (mother). Relationship type is Mother. Login credentials are oscardoc / oscar with PIN 1117. The data is synthetic, created by the task setup script, not from real patients. OSCAR EMR (Open Source Clinical Application and Resource) is a legitimate Canadian open-source electronic medical record system used in real healthcare settings, but this task runs on a local Docker instance for testing purposes.
